title: Fiery Charred Tunisian German Sausages Wrap
description: A char-grilled and shattering kid-friendly dish from Tunisia featuring German sausages, wrapped in ti-leaf wraps.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Grill the German sausages for 5-7 minutes per side, or until charred and cooked through.
Meanwhile, grill the ti-leaf wraps for 30-45 seconds per side, or until slightly charred.
Slice the grilled sausages into 1-inch pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced sausages, red onion, red bell pepper, cucumber, tomato, and chili flakes.
Drizzle the lemon juice and olive oil over the top and toss to combine.
Warm the grilled ti-leaf wraps by wrapping them in foil and heating them in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the sausage mixture onto the center of each wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap to form a tight cylinder.
